prompts.prompt: Create an Argo Rollouts canary Rollout for image api:v1, 4 replicas, shifting traffic 20/50/80 percent with 5 minute pauses between steps.
Write a blue-green Argo Rollouts manifest with an active service, a preview service, and a manual promotion gate.
Generate an Argo Rollouts canary Rollout using the AWS ALB ping-pong pattern for zero-downtime deployments, with stable+canary services and a root service.
Write an AnalysisTemplate that queries Prometheus for the 5m success rate and aborts the rollout below 95%.
Convert a standard apps/v1 Deployment (image api:v1, 4 replicas) into an Argo Rollout canary.
My Argo rollout is stuck in Paused status and won't advance. How do I move it forward?
My canary traffic isn't shifting to the new version - it all still goes to stable. What do I check?
How do I abort a bad Argo Rollouts deployment and get back to the previous version?
With Argo CD for GitOps plus Argo Rollouts, will an abort cause an endless rollback loop with Argo CD?
My canary has a memory leak and my HPA is scaling up the stable pods too. How do I stop the HPA fighting the canary?
Create a standard Kubernetes Deployment for nginx with rollingUpdate maxSurge 1 maxUnavailable 0.
Write a Helm values.yaml for a web service: replicaCount, image, and service config.
Create a HorizontalPodAutoscaler for my Deployment targeting 70% average CPU.
Create a Kubernetes Service and an Ingress for an nginx deployment on port 80.
Write a Dockerfile for a Python FastAPI app using uv and uvicorn.
Create a ServiceAccount and a read-only ClusterRole plus binding for viewing pods.
